Everything you need for clinical AI

A complete workflow from image upload to validated clinical reports, powered by AI.

Secure Authentication

Role-based access for patients, doctors, and clinics with HIPAA-compliant data handling.

Smart Image Upload

Drag-and-drop X-ray, PNG, JPG, JPEG upload with instant preview and file validation.

AI Analysis Engine

Get AI-generated findings with confidence scores, anomaly detection, and clinical notes.

Clinical Reports

Download structured PDF reports with findings, timestamps, and doctor validation status.

Doctor Review

Clinicians can validate AI findings, add notes, and approve reports for clinical use.

Scan History

Track all past scans in a searchable dashboard with status indicators and quick access.
